creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Hello,

On Fri, Dec 21, 2012 at 01:13:48PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/collectd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/174604 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174604
> 
Yes, I approve this patch. Thanks a lot for help to maintain collectd
port.

Greetings,
-- 
Krzysztof Stryjek
UNIX administrator/Juniper Networks Specialist
email: wtp (at) bsdserwis (dot) com
http://www.linkedin.com/in/KrzysztofStryjek
GPG fingerprint: 8BD7 40CE 8994 0BBE CE6C  91CD 1292 8959 DC61 0E76

In theory, there is no difference between theory and practice.
In practice, there is.
